title: harnessed agent
description: An AI coding harness definition (catalog/agents/<name>/agent.yaml). Declares how the harness container image is built. An agent is NOT a recipe — recipes compose ONTO an agent. See ARCHITECTURE.md §Vocabulary and docs/harnessed-design.md §6/§8.

type.description: Catalog kind marker. Always 'agent' for an agent manifest.

harness.description: The AI coding harness this agent runs. Exactly one per agent. All harnesses consume the same Claude-canonical profile; they differ only in how they read it and reach hatago (design §8).

image.description: The container image tag built for this agent (e.g. harnessed-claude). FROM harnessed-base + the harness CLI installer.

dockerfile.description: Path (repo-relative) to the Dockerfile that builds this agent image.

build_args.description: Build arguments passed to `podman build` for this agent's image (each as --build-arg NAME=value). The single source of truth for pinned tool versions (e.g. OMP_VERSION); the agent Dockerfile's matching ARG carries no default. Keys must match the Dockerfile ARG names.
